pr.title: RHOAIENG-59700: Feast operator client ConfigMap omits registry block — breaks workbench dropdown and Feast SDK (FeastRegistryNotSetError)
pr.body:
When no registry is explicitly configured in a FeatureStore CR, the operator
now auto-enables a local registry with a REST API server. This ensures the
client ConfigMap always includes a registry block, preventing FeastRegistryNotSetError
in the SDK and fixing the empty "Select Feature Store" dropdown in the dashboard.

Closes [RHOAIENG-59700](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-59700)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Workflow Validation <workflow-validation@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Improved registry defaulting so a local registry is auto-created when missing and transport/persistence defaults are applied.

* **Tests**
  * Updated and expanded tests to expect additional services/containers and broaden reconciliation and readiness validations across auth, storage, TLS, PVC, and registry scenarios; adjusted CLI test invocations to use unbuffered Python output for more reliable test diagnostics.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
